commands.review_summary:
The branch replaces the preflight token estimate with an LLM-boundary pressure heuristic for tool results and assistant tool-call arguments, composes the tool-result guard with ownsCompaction context engines, and adds focused Vitest coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. there is a high-confidence source and saved-session reproduction path: current main uses the compaction-safe estimator, and the PR body reports a replay of the failed Codex transcript showing the fixed preflight now routes to compaction. I did not rerun that private saved-session replay in this read-only checkout.
